case_title: JIMMY GRADY VS. JOSEFINA BORNTACIO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRADY, JIMMY AS TO DEFENDANT BORNTACIO, JOSEFINA DOES 1-100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-31-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-29-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-16-2003
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRADY, JIMMY SERVED JUL-21-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BORNTACIO, JOSEFINA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-10-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-31-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRADY, JIMMY

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-20-2004 CONTINUED TO OCT-26-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH SEP-24-2004. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON JUL-20-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRADY, JIMMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONIFACIO, JOSEFINA SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
